live_free_collection.growth_contribution: 10% of Marchon's total sales growth in 2010
live_free_collection.global_ranking: #1 selling optical style globally in 2011, #1 in Asia
live_free_collection.award: Nike voted best mens, teens & kids optical frame brand of 2012 by 20/20 & Vision Monday Magazine
live_free_collection.strategy: Used VSP sales data analytics to drive product strategy, expanded from plastic-focused to include milled metal and standard eyewire metals
live_free_collection.special_editions: Ignite special edition aligned with Nike WC-11 Campaign, doubling 2011 sales

market_analysis.initial_breakdown: 67% plastic, 13% milled metal, 20% standard eyewire metals
market_analysis.expanded_breakdown: 20% plastic, 20% milled metal, 60% standard eyewire metals
market_analysis.insight: Resonated with guys segment, expanded into unisex and youth girl segments
